title: params.rs: HttpFetcher silently drops part-2 errors with misleading hash-mismatch diagnostic
description: params.rs:316-322 — HttpFetcher::fetch_combined swallows all errors and non-200 responses for part 2 with a comment 'file fits in part 1, which is fine'. If part 2 fails due to a transient server error (500, timeout) rather than a legitimate 404 (file fits in part 1), the function proceeds with truncated data. The subsequent BLAKE2b hash check in ensure_param_file will then fail with 'hash mismatch' or 'tampering', which is misleading — the real cause is a network error on part 2. Fix: distinguish 404/empty from server errors; return Err for 5xx on part 2 rather than silently concatenating incomplete data.
